title: Earth Tools
body:
This mod adds 5 new tools that are crafted from earth gems.
They have the same stats as iron tools, but with a earth-themed twist!

Features

1. Earth Sword
2. Earth Pickaxe
3. Earth Axe
4. Earth Shovel
5. Earth Hoe



Tools function exactly like iron tools. Just a fun, lightweight addition for players who want earth-themed gear.
